response.overview: In September 2007, the musical "DREAM BOYS" was staged at the Imperial Theatre in Tokyo, featuring a main cast of KAT-TUN members Kazuya Kamenashi & Koki Tanaka, alongside Tomoyuki Yara of MA (Musical Academy); the production garnered high acclaim & saw tickets sell out on the very first day. This release is packed with highlights, featuring the full two-act musical—showcasing innovative, dynamic, & intricate staging, such as Kamenashi’s aerial performance that made full use of the theater space—as well as the "SHOW TIME" segment, which is filled with famous songs and hits.
response.title: DREAM BOYS
